import gzip
import json


def compress_metrics(metrics: dict) -> bytes:
    payload = json.dumps(metrics).encode("utf-8")
    return gzip.compress(payload)


def compress_status(status: dict) -> bytes:
    data = json.dumps(status).encode()
    return gzip.compress(data)


def send_heartbeat() -> bytes:
    heartbeat = {"ts": 1234567890, "status": "alive"}
    return gzip.compress(json.dumps(heartbeat).encode())
